scope_note: QA Pudelko Modular Periodicity Cert family [198]: records the partially verified bridge from Pudelko modular Fibonacci periodicity to QA T-operator orbit families. The cert requires the claimed 3^k family counts for m=3,9,27, preserves the documented V2/V5 open items, and prevents a docs-only family from being counted as a validated sweep entry without fixtures. Source: Pudelko arXiv 2510.24882 and local experiments qa_hensel_selforg_experiment.py, qa_hensel_orbit_cycling_experiment.py, qa_bateson_coupling_experiment.py.
